wine_hotels.name: La Foresteria Wine Resort - Planeta Estate
wine_hotels.address: Contrada Passo di Gurra, SP 79, Km 91, 92013 Menfi (AG), Sicily
wine_hotels.description: Michelin Key-recognised 13-room wine resort at Planeta Estate in Menfi; panoramic hillside setting above vineyards and olive groves; on-site restaurant, pool, Turkish bath and exclusive access to Insula Beach Club 5 km away.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Full access to Planeta portfolio across five Sicilian estates; daily vineyard and cellar tours; cooking classes with estate chef
wine_hotels.tip: Request a Pool Suite for the best vineyard views; the Chef Angelo Pumilia cooking classes fill fast.

verified.address_quoted: Contrada Passo di Gurra, Ex S.S. 115 s.p. 79, Km 91 - 92013 Menfi (Ag)

wine_hotels.name: Monaci delle Terre Nere
wine_hotels.description: Relais and Chateaux wine resort in a restored 17th-century Augustinian monastery on Etna's slopes; 27 rooms and private pool villas; estate vineyards produce celebrated Nerello Mascalese; Locanda Nerello restaurant on-site.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Estate Nerello Mascalese vineyard tours; wine tastings with in-house sommelier; Etna wine pairings at Locanda Nerello
wine_hotels.tip: One of three Eco-Bio certified properties in Sicily; the treehouse suite is a rare accommodation category.

wine_hotels.name: Zash Country Boutique Hotel and Spa
wine_hotels.description: Design Hotel in a restored 19th-century millstone press on Etna's eastern slope; Michelin-starred restaurant by chef Giuseppe Raciti since 2019; 13 hectares of citrus groves between the volcano and the Ionian Sea.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Etna-centric wine list at Michelin-starred restaurant; cellar tours and curated wine experiences with estate focus
wine_hotels.tip: The old wine-fermentation chamber is now the restaurant's heart; book the Michelin menu with Etna wine pairing for the full experience.

verified.address_quoted: Strada Provinciale 2/I-II n.60 95018 Archi - Riposto (CT) - Sicily

wine_hotels.name: Shalai Resort
wine_hotels.description: Boutique 13-room hotel and Michelin-starred restaurant in a restored 1800s nobleman's villa on Etna's north slope; meticulous Etna wine cellar curated for chef Giovanni Santoro's cuisine; SPA and wellness area.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Dedicated Etna wine cellar; Michelin-starred wine and food pairings; north slope Etna producer focus
wine_hotels.tip: The smallest and most intimate Michelin-wine-hotel on Etna; the cellar is curated to complement Santoro's creative cuisine.

wine_hotels.name: Barone di Villagrande Wine Resort
wine_hotels.description: Four-room manor-house wine resort at Sicily's oldest Etna DOC producer (est. 1727); infinity pool with sea views; vineyard tours, estate tastings and restaurant meals with contrade-specific Carricante and Nerello Mascalese.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Estate Etna DOC tastings; contrade vineyard tours; exclusive Contrada Villagrande Carricante
wine_hotels.tip: Milo on Etna's eastern slope has a microclimate that gives the Carricante its distinctive mineral salinity.

verified.address_quoted: Via del Bosco, 25, 95010 Milo, Metropolitan City of Catania

wine_hotels.name: Tenuta di Castellaro Wine Relais
wine_hotels.description: Wine relais on Lipari in the Aeolian Islands; three residences (Casa Pomice, Casa Ossidiana, Casa Caolino) restored from ancient ruins with lava stone and wood; organic volcanic-vineyard estate with sunset wine picnics.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Estate Malvasia delle Lipari DOC and volcanic blends; sunset picnic tastings; Aeolian archipelago dining collaborations
wine_hotels.tip: The sunset picnic-tasting in the vineyard is the signature Aeolian wine experience; book well in advance for summer.

wine_hotels.name: Regaleali Case Grandi - Tasca d'Almerita
wine_hotels.address: Contrada Regaleali SNC, 93010 Vallelunga Pratameno (CL), Sicily
wine_hotels.description: Nine rooms around a 17th-century palazzo magnolia courtyard at Tasca d'Almerita's historic Regaleali estate; working wine farm with 200-plus years of winemaking history; hiking, bike rides and cooking classes in a remote Sicilian highland.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Estate Regaleali DOC tastings; cooking classes at Anna Tasca Lanza school; vineyard and cellar tours with Tasca winemakers
wine_hotels.tip: The most authentic agriturismo wine estate stay in Sicily; request the harvest programme in October.

verified.address_quoted: Contrada Regaleali SNC, 93010 Vallelunga Pratameno CL Italy

wine_hotels.name: Palmento Costanzo Wine Resort
wine_hotels.address: Contrada Santo Spirito, 95012 Passopisciaro, Castiglione di Sicilia (CT), Sicily
wine_hotels.description: Boutique wine resort within the restored 19th-century palmento estate at Passopisciaro; accommodation overlooks 18 hectares of volcanic-soil Etna vineyards; wine-club access for guests.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Estate Nerello Mascalese and Carricante tastings; vineyard contrade walks; palmento heritage tour
wine_hotels.tip: The palmento is one of the most photographed wine buildings on Etna; stay here for the best golden-hour light.

verified.address_quoted: Contrada Santo Spirito, Passopisciaro 95012, Castiglione di Sicilia

wine_hotels.name: Feudo Maccari Casa Sparse
wine_hotels.address: Contrada Maccari, Strada Provinciale Noto-Pachino KM 13.5, 96017 Noto (SR), Sicily
wine_hotels.description: Simple estate guesthouses on 170-hectare Feudo Maccari vineyards in Val di Noto; self-catering accommodation with well-stocked breakfast; cellar visits and Nero d'Avola tastings in a dramatic desert-scrub landscape.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Estate Nero d'Avola and Syrah tastings; underground cellar visits; vineyard walks in Val di Noto
wine_hotels.tip: The most remote and dramatic wine-estate stay in Sicily; a clear sky here is spectacular.

verified.address_quoted: C. Maccari, Strada Prov. Noto-Pachino, KM 13.5, 96017 Noto (SR)

wine_hotels.name: Agrirelais Baglio di Pianetto
wine_hotels.address: Via Francia, Santa Cristina Gela, 90030 Palermo (PA), Sicily
wine_hotels.description: Organic winery and agrirelais a few km from Palermo; the restored family baglio offers accommodation alongside introductory wine courses, vineyard tours and tastings across Palermo, Noto and Etna terroirs.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Organic estate tastings across three terroirs; wine courses; olive oil tasting
wine_hotels.tip: Best proximity to Palermo of any wine estate stay; good base for Monreale and Segesta day trips.

verified.address_quoted: Via Francia, S. Cristina Gela - 90030 (PA) - Italy

wine_hotels.name: Pantelleria Dream Resort (Donnafugata-adjacent)
wine_hotels.description: Dammuso-style resort 7 minutes from Donnafugata's Khamma estate and the UNESCO Zibibbo vineyard; 43 dammuso-form rooms; recommended base for Pantelleria wine tourism including Ben Ryé passito experiences.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Proximity to Donnafugata Pantelleria estate for Zibibbo and Ben Ryé tastings; island wine and caper produce focus
wine_hotels.tip: Book the Ben Ryé sotto le stelle tasting at Donnafugata Pantelleria as a sunset complement to dinner at the resort.

wine_hotels.name: Dimora Cottanera
wine_hotels.address: Strada Provinciale 89, Contrada Iannazzo, 95030 Castiglione di Sicilia (CT), Sicily
wine_hotels.description: Boutique vineyard retreat at Cottanera's 100-hectare Etna estate; immersive access to the contrade vineyard system and single-variety Nerello Mascalese tastings in one of Etna's most awarded cellars.
wine_hotels.wine_program: Contrade-specific Nerello Mascalese tastings; cellar tours; vineyard walks; Le Contrade lunch
wine_hotels.tip: Guests get priority access to the contrade tasting format before public booking opens.

verified.address_quoted: Strada Provinciale, 89 - Contrada Iannazzo, 95030 Castiglione di Sicilia CT
